description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in an olive green fabric with a subtle, slightly textured weave. The sofa features two large, attached seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which are uniform in size and shape, creating a clean and symmetrical appearance. The armrests are broad, rounded, and padded, extending from the seat height up to the top of the backrest, providing a comfortable and supportive edge. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the height of the armrests and offering a cohesive silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, slightly tapered wooden legs, each positioned at the corners and finished in a natural wood tone. The overall design is modern and understated, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern olive green two-seater sofa with broad, padded armrests, attached seat and back cushions, and four short wooden legs. The upholstery is subtly textured, and the design is clean and symmetrical.
description_view_0: Side view showing the broad, rounded armrest and the full depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous, straight backrest and the four wooden legs at the corners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two attached seat and back cushions, the symmetrical armrests, and the sofa's inviting seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached back cushions, all uniform in size and forming a symmetrical arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and seat, with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slightly tapered wooden legs positioned at each corner, exposed and finished in a natural wood tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at full sofa width and matching armrest height, with two attached back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid olive green fabric with a subtle, slightly textured weave and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
